sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82038" key="perirrapi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιρρᾰπίζω</orth>, <sense id="n82038.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lash round about</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῇ οὐρᾷ π. τὸ ἐδώδιμον</foreign>, of fish, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.977b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
